x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Map Downloader CLI - Tool made by Snowy

options.name: input
options.description: An option to specify the required json file.

options.name: output
options.description: An optional argument to override the output folder of the downloaded files.

options.name: csv
options.description: An optional argument to override the csv located in the json file. Must be locally hosted.

options.name: fastdl
options.description: An optional argument to override the fastdl link located in the json file.

options.name: multi-thread
options.description: Downloads and extract the file concurrently.
